summary._source: Benzodiazepines are GABA-A positive allosteric modulators used as anxiolytics, sedatives, and anticonvulsants (e.g. diazepam, alprazolam, clonazepam).
summary.text: Benzodiazepines are GABA-A positive allosteric modulators used as anxiolytics, sedatives, and anticonvulsants (e.g. diazepam, alprazolam, clonazepam).
